title: Charts to be in sync on dashboards
excerpt:

posts.author: LosonszkiS (Silvia Losonszki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, it would be great if dashboards would be more interactive, e.g. if filtering by clicking on a chart would work in dashboards.
E.g. clicking on one of the slices of the pie chart would select the respective data category and instead of (or on top of) providing a drill-down option, it would filter all the charts on the same dashboard accordingly. This ways users could explore metrics related to data categories of their interest easily by a simple click on the charts.
